text: As I step into this corridor and approach the glass-walled room, vibrant with fluorescent blue light and bold R+D motifs, I sense an atmosphere of curiosity and innovation. The environment pulsates with the promise of discovery, urging me to reflect on the evolving relationship between humans and technology. I feel both alert and inspired, seeing each detail as an invitation to ponder what is being developed within these walls—and what implications it may have for our future together.
